---
title: "Videos"
subtitle: "Video companions with context, references and ways to explore the mathematics further."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Each YouTube video will have a companion page here: an extended description, key ideas, references, related notes and any corrections or later developments.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-video-anatomy}
::: {}
<p class="mn-kicker">EACH COMPANION PAGE</p>

## More than an embed

A video page is designed to remain useful after the video ends. It connects the spoken explanation to definitions, examples and avenues for further exploration.
:::

::: {.mn-structure-list}
<span>VIDEO</span>
<span>EXTENDED DESCRIPTION</span>
<span>KEY IDEAS AND TIMESTAMPS</span>
<span>REFERENCES</span>
<span>RELATED MATERIAL</span>
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Latest videos

::: {.mn-empty-state}
There are no published video companions yet. The first is being prepared; once it is ready, it will appear here with an extended description, references and links for exploring the mathematics further.
:::
:::
